---
title: "v4_s2_independent"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Description

Independent-coupling ablation for residual Flow Matching.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Architecture | CNO v2_loggrad + U-Net FM |
| Objective | Flow Matching on `HR - mu` |
| Coupling | independent |
| Motivation | test whether minibatch OT pairing matters |
| Research inspiration | Conditional Flow Matching pairing ablations |

## Variables

::: {.panel-tabset}
### thetao
::: {.figure-grid}
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR / CNO / CNO+FM
`assets/figures/v4_s2_independent/thetao/presentation.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR-LR / CNO Residual / FM Residual
`assets/figures/v4_s2_independent/thetao/residuals.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### CNO Error / FM Error
`assets/figures/v4_s2_independent/thetao/errors.png`
:::
:::
### so
`assets/figures/v4_s2_independent/so/`
### zos
`assets/figures/v4_s2_independent/zos/`
### uo
`assets/figures/v4_s2_independent/uo/`
### vo
`assets/figures/v4_s2_independent/vo/`
:::

## Metrics

`assets/metrics/v4_s2_independent.csv`
